name_en: 💕《Includes full original green box packaging》💕【New】GG Emblem Series Mini Wallet
name_cn:
💕《Includes full original green box packaging》💕【New】GG Emblem Series Mini Wallet
The new GG Emblem series reinterprets the brand's timeless elegance and exquisite craftsmanship. This beige and dark brown mini wallet reinterprets the brand's new small accessories collection, crafted from selected new GG monogram canvas. Carefully designed with multiple compartments, cleverly incorporating practical snap closure.
. Beige and dark brown new GG monogram coated canvas
. Brown leather trim
. Taffeta lining
. Interior: 5 card slots, 1 open pocket, 1 zip pocket and 1 bill compartment
. Snap closure
. Closed dimensions: 11cm(W) x 8.5cm(H) x 3cm(D); Open dimensions: 11cm(W) x 17.5cm(H).
Model: 820692.
Dimensions: 11(L) x 8.5(W) x 3(D)
Color: Beige PVC/Original leather.
Italian creation
